general.prompt: Which president gave a primetime speech claiming election vulnerabilities, but really just rehashed old news?
options: The driver in a fatal crash
general.summary: President Donald Trump claimed election vulnerabilities, but declassified documents showed known issues.

general.prompt: Japan's parliament just made a historic move that could doom the imperial family. What did they do?
options: Recast the emperor after an injury
general.summary: Japan's parliament enacted a revision insisting only men from the paternal line can become emperor.

general.prompt: A driver was involved in a fatal cyclist crash in Boston. What did they do before the accident?
general.summary: The driver maneuvered around another vehicle before the crash.

general.prompt: Why was Kratos actor Ryan Hurst recast in the 'God of War' adaptation?
options: He was busy driving in Boston
He got lost in a lettuce field
He was too cheerful for the role
general.summary: Ryan Hurst was recast after suffering an on-set injury.

general.prompt: Which restaurant chain was linked to a parasitic outbreak from Taylor Farms lettuce?
general.summary: Taco Bell was linked to a parasitic outbreak from Taylor Farms lettuce.

tech.prompt: What fresh digital nightmare did Apple summon in iOS 27?
options: A sentient calculator that judges your spending habits
An app that turns your iPhone into a virtual pet rock
An all-new app to your iPhone’s Home Screen
A new app with Siri and Apple Intelligence features
tech.summary: iOS 27 public beta adds a new app with new Siri and Apple Intelligence features.

tech.prompt: What will the EU force Google to do that might endanger your privacy?
options: Share search data and open up AI on Android
Provide free massages to all Android users
Force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android
Replace Google Search with a roulette wheel
tech.summary: EU will force Google to share search data and open up AI on Android, potentially endangering privacy.

tech.prompt: What material did Nodus and Raven use for their new tactical TrailTrekker watch?
tech.summary: Nodus and Raven collaborated on a TrailTrekker watch with lume-infused forged carbon.

tech.prompt: What did Linus Torvalds say to critics of AI coding in Linux?
options: I will delete the entire Linux kernel
Fork it. Or just walk away.
Fork it. Or just walk away.
tech.summary: Linus Torvalds told critics of AI tools in Linux to 'fork it or just walk away'.

tech.prompt: According to GameStop's CEO, what is 'totally irrelevant'?
tech.summary: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen said physical games are 'totally irrelevant'.

business.prompt: Which fast food giant's lettuce may have caused a parasitic outbreak?
business.summary: A parasitic outbreak has been linked to Taylor Farms lettuce supplied to Taco Bell.

business.prompt: What did the FDA just approve that's a first-of-its-kind?
business.summary: The FDA approved a first-of-its-kind pill to reduce cholesterol.

business.prompt: Which Chinese AI model stunned Silicon Valley with open-weight results?
business.summary: China's open-weight Kimi model stunned the AI world with frontier-level results.

business.prompt: Why did Seven & i shares jump 3%?
options: FDA approval for a new pill
Launch of a new Taco Bell menu item
business.summary: Seven & i shares jumped after a report of stake talks with Poland's Zabka Group.

business.prompt: What is one reason experts say SpaceX stock has fallen?
options: Competition from a Chinese AI model
A lettuce shortage at Taco Bell
The stock stands 40% below its peak after IPO
Elon Musk bought a stake in Zabka
business.summary: SpaceX stock has fallen 40% below its post-IPO peak, according to experts.

sports.prompt: Who needs a collarbone? Two cyclists found out the hard way in the Tour de France! What did they break?
options: Two collarbone breaks among the damage tally
sports.summary: Two cyclists, Jenno Berckmoes and Fernando Gaviria, suffered collarbone fractures in a stage 12 crash.

sports.prompt: Portland and the Trail Blazers are like an old married couple fighting over the remote. What did the city just send?
sports.summary: Portland sent a term sheet to the Trail Blazers for a long-term agreement, despite recent NBA statements.

sports.prompt: Adam Silver says Caitlin Clark is being kicked around like a soccer ball. What did he call her?
sports.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver said Caitlin Clark has become a 'political football'.

sports.prompt: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar is not ready to crown Caitlin Clark. What did he disagree with?
options: Calling her the face of the WNBA
Calling her the face of the WNBA
sports.summary: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar disagreed with calling Caitlin Clark the 'face of the WNBA'.

sports.prompt: LeBron to Miami? Pat Riley and Giannis are already planning the parade! What would they be excited about?
sports.summary: Pat Riley and Giannis Antetokounmpo would be excited to have LeBron James play in Miami.

science.prompt: What did Chinese scientists discover about making babies in space? That it's...
options: a tricky business with microgravity and radiation
impossible because astronauts can't get romantic
easier than having babies on Pluto's landslides
a piece of cake — babies love zero G
science.summary: Researchers using China's Tianzhou spacecraft found that microgravity and space radiation can negatively affect biology, posing challenges for reproduction in space.

science.prompt: What did NASA find out about the near-Earth object 1998 SH2? It's actually...
options: a dark comet, not an asteroid
an asteroid with alien amino acids
science.summary: NASA revealed that the near-Earth object 1998 SH2, originally thought to be an asteroid, is actually a 'dark comet'.

science.prompt: What did the meteorite that crashed through a New Jersey home contain?
options: a message from aliens saying 'Hello, Earthlings!'
science.summary: A meteorite fragment that hit a New Jersey home contained extraterrestrial amino acids.

science.prompt: What did astronomers discover on Pluto that could bury entire cities?
options: evidence of a dark comet impact
science.summary: Astronomers discovered landslides on Pluto large enough to bury entire cities on Earth.

science.prompt: What did astronomers find around a rocky Earth-like planet in the habitable zone?
options: a giant sign saying 'Welcome to Planet B'
science.summary: Astronomers discovered the first atmosphere around a rocky Earth-like planet in the habitable zone.
